Title: Register User
Steps: 1. Go to home page 2. Click Signup/Login 3. Enter name+email, click Signup 4. Fill account info form 5. Click Create Account 6. Click Continue 7. Delete Account (cleanup)
column9: and teardown succeeds with no orphaned data

Title: Login with correct email and password
Steps: 1. Go to Signup/Login 2. Enter correct email/password 3. Click Login
Expected Result: User is authenticated; header shows Logged in as <username>

Title: Login with incorrect email/password
Steps: 1. Go to Signup/Login 2. Enter wrong email/password 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Error 'Your email or password is incorrect!' is shown; no session created

Title: Logout User
Expected Result: User is redirected to login page; session cleared

Title: Register with an already-registered email
Preconditions: An account already exists for the email used
Steps: 1. Go to Signup/Login 2. Enter name + existing email 3. Click Signup
Expected Result: Error 'Email Address already exist!' is displayed; no duplicate created

Title: Contact Us form
Steps: 1. Go to Contact Us 2. Fill name/email/subject/message 3. Upload a file 4. Click Submit
Expected Result: Success message shown; Home button returns to home page

Title: Search Product
Steps: 1. Go to Products 2. Enter keyword in search box 3. Click search
Expected Result: Only products matching the keyword are returned; result count > 0

Title: Add Products to Cart
Steps: 1. Go to Products 2. Add first product to cart, Continue Shopping 3. Add second product to cart, View Cart
Expected Result: Both products appear with correct price/qty/total = price x qty

Title: Verify product quantity in Cart
Steps: 1. Open a product detail page 2. Set quantity to 4 3. Add to cart, View Cart
Expected Result: Cart shows the product with quantity exactly 4 and line total = unit price x 4

Title: Remove Products from Cart
Preconditions: A product is in the cart
Steps: 1. Click the remove (X) icon on a cart row
Expected Result: Row is removed without a page reload; total recalculates immediately

Title: Place Order: Register before Checkout
Steps: 1. Register a new account 2. Add products to cart 3. Proceed to Checkout 4. Review address/order 5. Place Order 6. Fill payment details 7. Confirm 8. Delete account
Expected Result: Order total matches cart total; success confirmation shown; account cleanup succeeds
Automated: No - manual (simulated non-idempotent payment form kept manual by design)

Title: Place Order: Login before Checkout
Steps: Same as TC-11 but starting from Login instead of Signup
Expected Result: Same as TC-11 - order confirms successfully
